title: Bewisclient
description: All-in-one mod library for minecraft with many quality of life features, fully compatible with other fabric mods (Fullbright, Shulker Box Tooltip, Disable Pumpkin Overlay, Zoom, CPS, Coordinates)
body:
[![Donation Link for Stonewall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e27ae99aa2a20cfc78aa528cb464863f557b952.png)](https://tiltify.com/@bewis09/bewisclient-lgbtq-2)

# What is Bewisclient?

Bewisclient is a Minecraft fabric mod which adds a ton of features. It can be added to all modpacks. Right Shift to open the Menu!

An important part of Bewisclient are widgets, which preset much information directly on your screen. These widgets are highly customizable to match your style and needs!

Other quality of life features are the following:
- Zoom
- Disable Pumpkin Overlay
- Fullbright
- Held Item Info
- Fire Height
- Shulker Box Tooltip

# All Features

<details>
<summary>In Game Enhancements</summary>

- Fullbright
- Custom Block Border Color
- Custom Entity hit Color
- Held Item Info
- Zoom
- Disable Pumpkin Overlay
- No Fog (Lava, Water, Powder Snow, Nether)
- Scoreboard Scale
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Perspective
- Fire Height
- Panorama Background Changer
- Pack Downloader from Modrinth

</details>

<details>
<summary>Widgets</summary>

- FPS Widget
- CPS Widget
- Armor Widget
- Coordinates Widget
- Biome Widget
- Day Widget
- Daytime Widget
- Ping Widget
- Key Widget
- Inventory Widget
- Speed Widget
- Tiwyla Widget (This is what you're looking at)
- Custom Widget
- Server IP Widget

![Widget Configuration Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OZwaEcSl/images/4acc1e2de4fcb2bda7b96fd66a717335b10adcbf.png)

</details>
<details>
<summary>Other Features</summary>

- Cosmetics
- Screenshot List
- Contact Screen

</details>
<details>
<summary>Not yet available in the newest Version</summary>

- Custom Crosshair (Beta)
- Different Profiles
- Mod menu

</details>
